task_completion.description: Extract only allocated files using Sleuth Kit
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window showing a command like 'tsk_recover -a /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd /home/ga/evidence/constrained_export/' and its successful execution output.

task_completion.description: Create Autopsy case with specific name and number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the active case name as 'Constrained_Warrant_2024' and case number 'INV-WAR-008' in the title bar or case details.

task_completion.description: Add the exported directory as a Logical Files data source
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy Data Sources tree showing 'constrained_export' as a logical file set (folder icon), NOT a disk image.

task_completion.description: Enable only File Type Identification and Hash Lookup ingest modules
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy Ingest Modules dialog showing ONLY 'File Type Identification' and 'Hash Lookup' checked, or an ingest progress window confirming only these modules ran.

task_completion.description: Generate an HTML Report in Autopsy
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy GUI showing the 'Generate Report' dialog with 'HTML Report' selected and completed, or the Reports node in the tree expanded showing an HTML report.

task_completion.description: Write the compliance summary text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal (e.g., cat command) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/warrant_summary.txt' with the exact lines: SOURCE_IMAGE, EXTRACTION_METHOD, LOGICAL_FILES_COUNT, and WARRANT_COMPLIANCE: VERIFIED.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to process the case
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Autopsy application interface being interacted with, not just file manipulation in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not ingest the raw .dd file into Autopsy
integrity.visual_evidence: The Autopsy Data Sources tree must NOT show 'ntfs_undel.dd' or a disk image icon. It should only show the logical files.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely executed the extraction command
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows the actual output of the extraction tool (like tsk_recover) processing files, not just a typed command that was never executed.
